title: Has the war ended? 10 things to know about the US-Iran ceasefire
content: US President Trump announced a two-week pause on military strikes against Iran, contingent on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and diplomatic engagement. While a narrow window for talks has opened, the situation remains volatile. Iran has proposed a 10-point peace framework, but discrepancies and ongoing military activity highlight the fragility of the de-escalation.

title: Why stock market up today? Nifty50 above 23,900; BSE Sensex rallies over 2,800 points
content: Stock market today: Buoyed by the two week US-Iran ceasefire, stock markets opened in green on Wednesday, rallying strongly ahead of the RBI monetary policy review. While Nifty50 went above 23,900, BSE Sensex rose over 2,800 points.

title: Goldman Sachs has more bad news for employees facing AI layoffs
content: Goldman Sachs warns AI job losses could inflict lasting financial damage, with affected workers facing years of lower pay and slower career progression.  Analysis reveals technology-displaced individuals experience reduced earnings growth and prolonged unemployment.  However, retraining offers a path to recovery, significantly boosting wages and reducing joblessness.

title: Sooryavanshi stuns Bumrah, does what Samson, Abhishek, Gill couldn’t in T20s
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi achieved a remarkable feat against Jasprit Bumrah in the IPL, smashing two sixes off the formidable bowler in his very first encounter. This electrifying performance saw the young batsman score 39 off 14 balls, a feat no other prominent T20 star has managed against Bumrah.

title: 'Not end of war': Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei cautions after two-week ceasefire with US
content: Iran's Supreme Leader ordered a ceasefire after a month of conflict, stating it's not the end of the war. This move follows a stern warning from Trump and Iran's conditions for a lasting resolution, including sanctions relief and compensation. Tehran also pledged not to pursue nuclear weapons if its terms are met.

title: Canada has changed immigration rules; changing visa fee, work permit rules and more
content: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting in April 2026 with increased passport and citizenship fees, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain more control over candidate assessment, and rural employers can hire more foreign workers. Saskatchewan introduces new application fees for its nominee program.

title: ‘Hum mazdoor aadmi hain’: Shami stays grounded despite prolonged India snub
content: Ace pacer Mohammed Shami, returning to his 'karm bhoomi' Eden Gardens, emphasised his 'labourer' mentality and commitment to hard work despite injuries and national team absence.  He highlighted the importance of staying grounded and retaining his hunger for the game, drawing strength from his farmer roots and dedication to Bengal cricket.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office collection day 20: Film eyes Rs 1,650 cr worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, nearing Rs 1,650 crore worldwide after 20 days. The spy thriller maintained strong performance on its third Tuesday, adding Rs 10.10 crore to its Indian net collection, which now stands at Rs 1,033.37 crore.

title: When Elon Musk told Sam Altman that OpenAI is on path of certain failure vs Google
content: In January 2018, Elon Musk told Sam Altman that OpenAI was on a path of certain failure against Google—then quit the company when his proposed fix was rejected. Seven years later, Altman declared a company-wide "code red" over Google Gemini's resurgence and Anthropic's enterprise dominance. Musk's structural diagnosis turned out to be largely correct. The problem he identified remains unsolved, just considerably bigger.

title: From the brink to a breather: Trump's Iran pivot buys time, not trust
content: The United States and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire. This pause follows days of escalating strikes and threats. Pakistan played a key role in brokering the truce. Talks are scheduled for Friday in Islamabad. The agreement aims to de-escalate tensions and open a path for diplomacy. Global oil prices had surged significantly during the conflict.

title: IPL 2026, Delhi weather: Will rain play spoilsport in DC vs GT clash today?
content: Delhi Capitals and Gujarat Titans face a weather threat for their IPL 2026 clash. Afternoon showers and thunderstorms are predicted, potentially delaying the match. While evening conditions look clearer, ground staff face a challenge. The match is expected to proceed, but outfield and pitch conditions could be affected.

title: Deepika Padukone breaks 'silent treatment' on Dhurandhar 2
content: Amid chatter around her absence from the screening of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, Deepika Padukone has finally addressed speculation surrounding her “silence” on husband Ranveer Singh’s latest blockbuster. The sequel, which hit theatres on March 19, has been receiving praise from both audiences and industry insiders, with Ranveer’s performance drawing particular acclaim. However, fans had been questioning why Deepika hadn’t publicly reacted to the film’s success or attended its Mumbai screening.

title: From NASA intern to tragic end: Maharashtra student dies in US months after road crash
content: A promising Indian student, Nilam Shinde, pursuing her MS in engineering in California, tragically passed away after being hit by a speeding vehicle. Despite her father's visa struggles and her comatose state, Nilam's organs were donated with his consent. Her funeral was held in California following Hindu rituals.

title: ‘It’s amazing’: Hardik Pandya in awe of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s fearless rise
content: Hardik Pandya lauded 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's fearless 39 off 14 balls, which, alongside Jaiswal's 77, propelled Rajasthan Royals to 150/3. Mumbai Indians fell short, restricted to 123/9 in the rain-hit IPL clash. Pandya attributed the loss to his bowlers' lack of execution, urging his team to learn and bounce back stronger.

title: Salman Khan gets relief from Rajasthan HC over 'misleading advertisements'
content: Actor Salman Khan has received relief from the Rajasthan High Court, which has stayed the bailable warrant issued against him by the Jaipur District Consumer Commission-II.

title: Justice B V Nagarathna: Women cannot be 'untouchables' for 3 days every month
content: Justice B.V. Nagarathna strongly criticized the historical practice of isolating menstruating women, deeming it a form of "untouchability." While hearing arguments on the Sabarimala temple entry ban, she questioned the validity of such social customs. Solicitor General Tushar Mehta countered, arguing the deity's unique attributes and devotees' faith should not be tested by gender equality standards.

title: Traffic jam in the jungle: Viral video shows tiger surrounded by vehicles at Ranthambore
content: A video from Ranthambore National Park shows a tiger surrounded by numerous safari vehicles. The incident has gone viral and drawn criticism online. Many users expressed concern over the animal's distress and the lack of space. This event highlights the need for improved safari management to ensure wildlife protection and safe viewing distances.

title: Rodgers, Steelers eye $82M move for ex-Giants All-Pro star
content: The Pittsburgh Steelers are being linked to Dexter Lawrence II following his trade request from the New York Giants, but the situation is far from straightforward. While connections with Patrick Graham and available cap space make the move plausible, Lawrence’s projected $82 million contract and recent dip in production raise valid concerns. Under new head coach Mike McCarthy, the Steelers appear to be redefining their identity, possibly leaning toward younger, cheaper talent. That makes this potential deal as risky as it is tempting.

title: Asmongold breaks silence on Twitch ban, slams double standards
content: Asmongold was banned from Twitch for a week after making a controversial remark. He defended himself online, claiming a “double standard” in enforcement. The suspension sparked mixed reactions, with some criticizing his language and others questioning Twitch’s consistency. The platform has not issued an official statement on the incident so far.

title: Chiefs linked to $83M 49ers star amid contract uncertainty
content: NFL trade rumours picked up their momentum after the Kansas City Chiefs reportedly eyed San Francisco 49ers veteran Trent Williams for their left tackle position. With ongoing contract talks between Williams and the 49ers unresolved, the Chiefs are prepared to make a trade. This move comes as Kansas City seeks long-term stability for Patrick Mahomes' blind side, despite drafting Josh Simmons last year.

title: IPL 2026: Yashasvi Jaiswal hits 100 sixes, joins Royals' elite power-hitters
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal achieved a significant IPL milestone, hitting his 100th six during Rajasthan Royals' commanding 27-run victory over Mumbai Indians. His unbeaten 77, coupled with a fiery cameo from 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, powered RR to 150/3 in a rain-shortened match.  The Royals bowlers then stifled MI's chase, securing a third consecutive win.

title: 'They don't understand mother's pain': 5th addicted son dies; drugs rip apart Punjab family
content: A critically ill drug addict, whose family's plight was highlighted in news reports, died at Amritsar Medical College within 24 hours of admission. Despite efforts, the patient succumbed to multiple complications, leaving his grieving mother to reiterate her claim that all five sons were lost to addiction, a statement contested by police.

title: Bengal voter count shrinks by 12% from pre-SIR level
content: In a striking turn of events, the voter list revision in Bengal has wrapped up, resulting in a staggering 12% reduction in the original roster. Close to 9 million names have been removed in a controversial second phase aimed at rectifying 'logical discrepancies,' accounting for 2.7 million deletions alone.

title: Oil prices today: Crude falls below $100 as Trump announces two-week ceasefire
content: Oil prices plummeted below $100 per barrel following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire with Iran, contingent on reopening the Strait of Hormuz. This development eased fears of supply disruptions, leading to the steepest oil decline in nearly six years. Despite the truce, analysts caution that risks to oil supply remain elevated due to ongoing tensions.

title: 'I have Maharaja’s sword': Delhi cops say assembly breach accused showing violent behaviour
content: A farmer, Sarabjit Singh, drove into Vidhan Sabha seeking help for his missing nephew, claiming he initially planned to target Parliament. Police are investigating his claims, including erratic statements about a "maharaja's sword," while his family insists he is mentally disturbed. No weapons were found, and authorities are verifying his medical documents.

title: Top stocks to buy today: Stock recommendations for April 8 - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Birlasoft, Bajaj Holdings, and Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd are the stocks recommended for buying by Mehul Kothari, DVP - Technical Research at Anand Rathi Shares today (April 8, 2026):

title: SUV rams IndiGo plane engine at Kolkata airport; aircraft grounded
content: An IndiGo A320 aircraft at Kolkata airport sustained damage to its right engine when an Oberoi catering vehicle collided with it on Tuesday night. The airline's engineers are assessing the extensive damage, which is expected to ground the aircraft for several days. An inquiry has been initiated by the airport authority.

title: 'Would football be fun if every game had 45 goals?': More sixes not making IPL 'special'
content: At a time when six-hitting has become the defining feature of T20 cricket, South African spinner Tabraiz Shamsi has raised serious concerns over the growing imbalance between bat and ball. Meanwhile, Mumbai Indians coach Mahela Jayawardene does not see this as a major issue, whereas Kuldeep Yadav believes that Test cricket exists to truly test skill sets.

title: Delhi records coolest April day in 3 years; maximum temperature 7 degrees below normal
content: Delhi experienced its coolest April day in three years as very light rain and gusty winds brought the maximum temperature down to 28.8 degrees Celsius. This weather pattern is expected to continue on Wednesday, with temperatures predicted to rise significantly from Thursday onwards, potentially reaching 37 degrees Celsius by April 12.

title: Candidates: How Divya Deshmukh outfoxed leader Anna Muzychuk to climb to the top
content: Indian chess saw mixed fortunes at the FIDE Candidates 2026. Divya Deshmukh surged to the top of the Women's leaderboard with a stunning victory over Anna Muzychuk, while R Praggnanandhaa's World Championship hopes dimmed after a crucial loss. Vaishali Rameshbabu drew her match, setting up an exciting all-Indian clash in the next round.

title: West Bengal polls: Appellate tribunal accepts Aadhaar card in first SIR appeal
content: An appellate tribunal ruled that Motab Shaikh and Motab Herul are the same person, accepting his Aadhaar card as proof of identity after the Election Commission failed to provide reasons for his exclusion. The tribunal noted discrepancies in voter lists and relied on supporting documents like Aadhaar, passport, and driving license to establish his identity.

title: Mavs dispute claim they erred with Reaves' MRI
content: The Mavericks disputed Lakers coach JJ Redick's claim that their medical team examined the wrong part of Austin Reaves' body when the Lakers guard received an MRI by the Mavs' staff.

title: Soler, Lopez trade haymakers, ejected in brawl
content: Angels DH Jorge Soler charged the mound after Braves starter Reynaldo Lopez threw a high inside pitch, as both players threw punches amid a bench-clearing brawl in the fifth inning of Tuesday's game.

title: NBA vet Malone sees 'special' opportunity at UNC
content: New Tar Heels coach Michael Malone called North Carolina the only college job he would've accepted, saying he recognizes he has a "chance to be a part of something special" there.

title: Colorado QB's BAC twice legal limit in fatal crash
content: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder had a blood alcohol level twice the legal limit for driving under the influence when he died in a single-car crash near Boulder on March 1.

title: Geno apologizes to Staley, says 'I lost myself'
content: UConn Huskies coach Geno Auriemma said in a statement Tuesday night that he lost himself with his behavior toward South Carolina coach Dawn Staley during his team's Final Four defeat last Friday.

title: Avalanche clinch Central, secure West's top seed
content: The Colorado Avalanche defeated the St. Louis Blues 3-1 on Tuesday night to clinch Central Division and secure the No. 1 seed in the Western Conference, but after the win, coach Jared Bednar was quick to caution his team is "not all the way there yet."

title: Tatum preps for MSG return: 'Just another game'
content: Jayson Tatum said that although he's not thrilled to return to the arena where he tore an Achilles less than a year ago, he is aiming to treat Thursday's matchup against the Knicks at MSG as "just another game."

title: Reinsdorf: Next Bulls GM must be sold on Donovan
content: Bulls CEO and president Michael Reinsdorf, who is looking for a new head of basketball operations after firing Arturas Karnisovas earlier this week, said Tuesday that retaining Billy Donovan as head coach would be a major requirement.

title: 🏈 Schrager's first-round NFL mock draft
content: Peter Schrager leans on his intel after last week's annual league meeting to project picks in the NFL draft. Here's where things stand right now in Round 1.

title: Top storylines: Scottie Scheffler, Bryson DeChambeau and sleeper contenders
content: Is Scottie Scheffler still the favorite? Can Bryson DeChambeau break through? How hard could the course play? We break down what to watch at the 2026 Masters.

title: Baseball in Latin America is broken -- is an international draft the answer?
content: As the search for the next Dominican baseball phenom intensifies, the tragic death of a teenager is the latest symptom of a failing system.

title: Way-Too-Early Top 25: Ranking the best teams for next season, now
content: The 2026 men's hoops champion has been crowned. We're rolling right into ranking next season's best teams -- with a few new rules.

content: Here's how next season is taking shape for every team that made the final rounds of the NCAA tournament.

title: Real Madrid say they can beat Bayern Munich after poor Champions League first leg. Are they right?
content: Lacking Bernabéu magic, Real Madrid can tee up a more spectacular comeback in Munich in the Champions League. They've done it before.

title: Inside the Bucks' lost season, and the looming 'nasty breakup' with Giannis Antetokounmpo
content: A difficult season exacerbated a 13-year relationship that was already on the rocks, leading to more questions than answers in Milwaukee.

title: PGA Tour vs. LIV in a much different place than it was at 2023 Masters
content: It's been three years, and while the LIV-PGA fight isn't necessarily 'won,' it certainly seems settled.

title: Michigan's championship punctuated Dusty May's homecoming in a full family affair
content: Just two seasons after arriving in Ann Arbor, May returned to his home state of Indiana to cut down the nets.

title: 'I started to love basketball again': How Michigan built a champion on fun and freedom
content: In the year of the freshman, Dusty May led a band of transfers and upperclassmen to a national title.

title: NBA playoff watch: Timberwolves look to clinch
content: Minnesota can lock up a top-six spot Tuesday. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Monday.

title: WNBA 2026 free agency: Predictions, biggest questions, more
content: Who are the biggest names who might be on the move, and how will the condensed offseason impact free agency?

title: Ranking the top 20 men's basketball players to enter the transfer portal
content: More than 1,000 players have entered the portal less than 24 hours after it opened. Here's the top talent.

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: Audi Crooks and Kymora Johnson lead the way. Plus, multiple players from Tennessee, Texas, Georgia and ISU.

title: Tiger Woods isn't at Augusta this week, yet Tiger Woods is everywhere this week
content: After the recent tumult, Woods won't be in Augusta, but Masters fans still seek the ghosts of past miracle shots. There is no unwinding this tournament and Tiger.

title: Bruno Fernandes is 31 and Man United's MVP, but they shouldn't extend his contract
content: Bruno Fernandes' brilliant season means that Man United's decision to extend his contract should be an obvious one, right? Except, looking at how things played out with Liverpool and Mo Salah, it's not so simple.

title: Michael Malone to UNC?! How it happened, next steps for Tar Heels
content: What should Malone's top priorities be? Here are the biggest questions about the next chapter in Chapel Hill.

title: Five takeaways from NCAA regionals -- and what they mean for nationals
content: Chiles and Chio continued their superstar ways. Oklahoma, Florida and LSU dominated. After NCAA gymnastics regionals, the final eight teams are set.

title: Prospect watch: Konnor Griffin's here, who's next?
content: All the prospects fantasy managers should be keeping an eye on as the season moves through its first month.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Why Wilder's win wasn't enough to join top 10 at heavyweight
content: The Deontay Wilder-Derek Chisora fight card caused a major shakeup, but not in the division you would think. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: San Diego leads the way, Washington back on track
content: San Diego Wave are the new leaders of the ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, while the Washington Spirit are soaring up.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Inter's Bastoni wants Barcelona move
content: Inter defender Alessandro Bastoni is reportedly eyeing a move to Barcelona. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Pickups: Jeremiah Fears, Will Riley among top adds for final week
content: Here are the players who can help fill holes on your roster during the final week of the fantasy basketball season.

title: 'Prudent To Wait And Watch': RBI Keeps Repo Rate Unchanged At 5.25%
content: The monetary policy committee, chaired by the RBI Governor, meets every two months to review key economic indicators and determine the policy stance

title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Exposes Critical Software Security Flaws
content: Anthropic on Tuesday said its yet-to-be-released artificial intelligence model called Claude Mythos has proven keenly adept...

title: Video: Employee Starts Massive Fire At California Toilet Paper Warehouse
content: Chamel Abdulkarim, 29, was initially reported as missing and was "later suspected to have started the fire in the warehouse", officials said.

title: Artemis II Crew, ISS Astronauts Speak On First Ship-To-Ship Space Call
content: Two International Space Station crews connected during an audio call and spoke about what it was like for the Artemis crew to launch and then fly around the moon.

title: After 15-Day Ceasefire Deal, Pak PM Invites US, Iran For Talks On Friday
content: Pakistani PM invited delegations from Tehran and Washington to Islamabad on "Friday, 10th April 2026, to further negotiate for a conclusive agreement to settle all disputes."

title: Iran Issues 10-Point Ceasefire Conditions, Trump Says "Plan Workable"
content: Iran's Supreme National Security Council said the ceasefire plan would require "continued Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz, acceptance of enrichment, and lifting of all primary and secondary sanctions."

title: The China Role In US-Iran Ceasefire
content: For Beijing, there is an incentive to see the war subside before Trump travels to China in mid-May. Citing demands of the war, Trump has been postponing his China trip, initially set for the end of March.

title: Big Drop In Oil Prices After Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire With Iran
content: Markets reacted within minutes of the ceasefire announcement by Donald Trump -- oil fell, bonds rose, and US stocks jumped.

title: Iran Ceasefire Deal A "Complete Victory" For US, Claims Trump
content: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt on Tuesday praised the two-week ceasefire in the Iran war, calling it a "victory"...

title: FBI Warned US Of Iran's "Persistent Threat", White House Downplayed It
content: The FBI warned U.S. state and local law enforcement of an elevated threat posed by Iran's government to targets in the United States

title: Bill Gates To Testify Before US House Panel On Epstein On June 10: Report
content: Billionaire Bill Gates is to testify on June 10 before a congressional committee investigating the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and his accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell, a source close to the matter told AFP on Tuesday.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: US, Iran Agree To Two-Week Ceasefire, Strait Of Hormuz To Reopen
content: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:  US President Donald Trump agreed to a two-day ceasefire just hours before the deadline he had set for Iran to capitulate, warning that otherwise a "whole civilisation will die tonight."

title: From Trump's End Of Civilisation' Threat To Ceasefire Before Deadline: What Really Happened
content: Donald Trump has said he would withhold "the bombing and attack of Iran" for two weeks, subject to Tehran reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Five Of UP Family Get Life Term In Murder Case
content: A court in Uttar Pradesh's Azamgarh district has sentenced five members of a family to life imprisonment in a nearly two-year-old murder case.

title: US‑Iran agree to two‑week ceasefire: Here is Trump’s full statement
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. Join us on a journey across continents as we unravel the stories that shape our interconnected world. Read More

title: SC hearing on Sabarimala women entry LIVE: Supreme Court to continue hearing of pleas today
content: Centre on Tuesday said that the issue of restriction on the entry of women aged between 10 and 50 years at the temple falls within the domain of religious faith

title: Punjab Excise department surpasses revenue target by ₹582 crore in 2025-26
content: Finance Minister Harpal Singh Cheema said the Excise Department has set an ambitious overall revenue target of ₹12,800 crore for the financial year 2026-27

title: NCB tells Bombay HC its inquiry into Wankhede based on non-anonymous complaints
content: Wankhede has filed a petition before the High Court challenging the probe into his conduct in drug-related cases, including the one connected to the death of actor Sushant Singh Rajput

title: D.K. Shivakumar asks Pralhad Joshi why fuel ships were sent to Gujarat, but none to Karnataka or Kerala
content: Karnataka Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar took exception to Mr. Joshi’s suggestion to autorickshaw drivers to shift to petrol from CNG in the wake of shortage

title: Head constable, associates booked for extortion racket targeting students in Bengaluru
content: The accused would target young college students, particularly those staying alone. Victims were allegedly picked up on the pretext of being involved in drug consumption or peddling

title: Joshi, Shettar meet victim in Hubballi ‘love jihad’ case
content: Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Pralhad Joshi has asked the Police Commissioner to investigate the case thoroughly as it appears to be work of a systematic network involved in ‘love jihad’

title: Uttarakhand police unable to enforce UCC due to delay in software update
content: A senior police officer said provisions of the law have not yet been uploaded on the Crime and Criminal Tracking Network and Systems

title: U.S. envoy to India Gor meets U.S. Commerce secretary Lutnick
content: Gor said he also had a meeting with Ben Black, the CEO of the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation and Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche

title: The good, the bad, and the ugly: Inside the world of shadow libraries in 2026
content: The preservation and sharing of knowledge online is a common goal for numerous academics, activists, pirates, hackers, and technologists. However, these efforts are both complicated and enriched by clashing beliefs

title: In Assam’s Mankachar, BJP’s infiltrator rhetoric causes hurt amidst geographical isolation, joblessness, and trouble with neighbouring Meghalaya
content: The 2023 delimitation exercise in Assam saw the two constituencies of South Salmara-Mankachar, situated in the south-westernmost tip of Assam, merging into one, named Mankachar

title: Assam tribal body calls for poll boycott of BJP
content: The organisation says BJP is trying to weaken indigenous identity by placing six communities in a ‘protected class’

title: BJP govt at Centre ‘deceived’ Rajbanshis by not delivering poll promises, says Abhishek Banerjee
content: TMC national general secretary  Abhishek Banerjee said the BJP at the Centre is yet to respond to the demand by the West Bengal government to recognise Rajbanshi language under the eighth schedule of the Constitution

title: How can Bengal election be fair when so many genuine voters are left out, asks Shashi Panja
content: Why did the BJP-led Centre have to go so deep to disenfranchise so many people if it is so confident of winning in the State, asks West Bengal Minister and Shashi Panja, a three-time Trinamool MLA, who like many other voters faced adjudication post SIR

title: West Bengal SIR: Electorate shrinks 12% since October, with the fresh exclusion of 27 lakh voters under adjudication
content: Since the SIR began, 91 lakh voters have been excluded; highest number of deletions of voters under adjudication in Muslim-dominated Murshidabad district, followed by North 24 Parganas and Malda

title: Untested TVK adding suspense to the script of Tamil Nadu thriller this time
content: As Vijay’s fledgling party makes its electoral debut two years after its founding, political observers say it could mirror the early performance of Vijayakanth’s DMDK, securing 8-10% of vote share; some argue the film personality’s popularity alone won’t suffice for lasting political impact

title: Tamil Nadu election: TVK leader Sengottaiyan’s nomination accepted after being kept on hold
content: When Mr. Sengottaiyan’s nomination papers were taken up, representatives of AIADMK candidate V.B. Prabhu raised objections, pointing to alleged discrepancies in the affidavit.

title: Why does India want fast breeder nuclear reactors? | Explained
content: Most of India’s current reactors are pressurised heavy water reactors, which are inefficient because only a small fraction of the fuel, around 1%, undergoes fission before it becomes unusable

title: Names of people belonging to Matua, minority communities deleted from post-SIR voter rolls: Mamata
content: Addressing a rally at Chakdaha in Nadia district, Mamata Banerjee said that the TMC will stand by those whose names were excluded from the voter rolls, following the Special Intensive Revision exercise

title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: Bid to woo new voters in CM Himanta’s long-time constituency Jalukbari
content: With Himanta Biswa Sarma criss-crossing the State as campaigner-in-chief, the challenge for local BJP canvassers in Jalukbari is to ensure healthy numbers in order to match or better the CM’s six-figure margin from 2021

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: A do-or-die battle for major fronts, their skippers
content: Having been in the political wilderness for a decade, the UDF  cannot afford to sit out of power for another five years. For the LDF, which suffered a series of setbacks in the Assembly bypolls, the Lok Sabha elections, and the local body polls, the April 9 Assembly elections will be a test of its credentials.  For the National Democratic Alliance too the polls will be decisive, having seen a slump in their vote share in the local body elections

title: Civil society groups complain of growing censorship to IT Ministry
content: The groups had an opportunity to speak on the subject during an IT Ministry consultative meeting on proposed changes to the IT Rules, 2021

title: Curtains come down on The Hindu Deep Tech Summit 2026
content: Ananth Kumar, Associate Director, Directorate of Entrepreneurship and Innovation (DEI), SRMIST gave the vote of thanks

title: Assam Police team visits Khera’s Delhi residence
content: Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, an entrepreneur and wife of the Assam CM, accuses Congress leader of using forged document to malign her; Congress calls it a “witch hunt” for asking questions in public interest

title: Sattankulam father-son custodial death case: all nine policemen get death sentence
content: The custodial torture was meted out to the father and son in June 2020, after they were detained at the Sattankulam police station on the mere charge of violating COVID-19 lockdown norms

title: Several villagers, police personnel injured in clash in Odisha amid protests against mining of bauxite
content: Tribal communities have been opposing mining at Sijimali, estimated to hold 311 million tonnes of bauxite, claiming that it would deplete perennial water sources and severely impact their livelihood

title: A plastics ban Tamil Nadu tried in 2002 and stepped back from
content: Introduced on May 7, 2002, the Bill proposed a ban on the sale, storage, transport and use of non-reusable plastics due to the rapid increase in disposable plastic consumption and its impact on groundwater contamination and rainwater percolation

title: The Sattankulam custodial deaths case and a woman police constable’s testimony | Focus Tamil Nadu
content: The custodial torture was meted out to the father-son traders in June 2020, after they were detained at the Sattankulam police station in Thoothukudi district on the mere charge of violating COVID-19 lockdown norms.

title: Meat shops in Haridwar to be shifted to outskirts ahead of Ardh Kumbh
content: 56 shops constructed to facilitate relocation, says mayor; decision is an expansion of already restricted sale and consumption of meat, liquor, and eggs within 5-km radius of Har Ki Pauri

title: Friends of Police: a community policing initiative that was shut down in Tamil Nadu after Sattankulam custodial deaths
content: What started as a small team of volunteers calling itself ‘Shore Care Committees’ and later ‘Friends of Police’ to guard the shores of Ramanathapuram district later proliferated to spread across the State of Tamil Nadu till 2020 when it was disbanded.

title: DMK’s win in T.N. polls will encourage other States to fight the BJP: Kanimozhi
content: At Sholinghur, Ms. Kanimozhi assured voters that the work on the proposed Bypass Road in Sholinghur town would be started once DMK returned to power

title: AIADMK functionaries held for scuffle over nominations in Tirupattur
content: Police said that as the former AIADMK Minister restricted himself in the taluk office, supporters reportedly hit G. Ramamurthy and his men in the taluk office premises

title: Battleground Baramati: Ajit Pawar’s son faces criticism over ‘immature’ comments against Congress
content: Calling him an ‘ungrateful son’, a bad orator, Congress questioned his ‘political convenience’ and silence over his father’s accidental death

title: Pollution by closed chromium factory, untreated effluents remain unsolved
content: Another issue that plagues voters in the constituency is the lack of proper connectivity by buses and trains

title: Tamil Nadu electorate grows by 6.35 lakh since February 23; scrutiny of nominations begins
content: Chennai, Chengalpattu, Coimbatore, Tiruvallur, and Tiruppur are the top five districts that recorded an increase in the number of electors

title: When historic markers in Chennai are demolished without explanation
content: The descendants of Dr. M.R. Gurusamy Mudaliar are asking as to why his name has been removed from a block at the Kilpauk Medical College (KMC) when the structure was rebuilt recently.

title: Southern districts of Tamil Nadu, once known as a laggard, seek to shed the bad image
content: In the last eight months, two important developments took place in Thoothukudi itself: the establishment of an electric vehicle plant and the commissioning of the first 660-MW supercritical thermal power plant. The Thoothukudi port has initiated tendering for the outer harbour

title: Hard work, honesty, empathy embedded in State’s social fabric, says Rahul Gandhi while hailing Kerala nurses
content: Rahul Gandhi calls for committing to build a health-care system that supports, respects, and empowers nurses

title: Assembly elections updates: Returning officer can recommend repoll if webcasting at polling stations interrupted deliberately, says ECI
content: Public campaigning for the April 9 Kerala, Puducherry and Assam Assembly polls ended on Tuesday, April 7, 2026; TVK chief Vijay's nomination for the Perambur and Tiruchirappalli Assembly constituencies for the April 23 polls was accepted after scrutiny

title: Women cannot be seen as ‘untouchables’ for three days a month: Justice Nagarathna in Sabarimala case
content: Centre objects to 2018 ruling drawing parallels between the Sabarimala bar on menstruating women and the practice of untouchability; S-G claims India is not as patriarchal or gender-stereotyped as the West understands

title: Public campaigning for bypolls in Bagalkot and Davangere concludes
content: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar, and other leaders make last-minute efforts to woo voters

title: Social ill cannot be branded as ‘religious practice’, says Supreme Court on maiden day of Sabarimala reference hearing
content: Legislature, not courts, is entitled to enact social reform, the Centre responds; as the Union government argues whether the judges have the expertise to decide on the matter, the court says it is empowered to examine opinions of experts.

title: Axe-wielding anti-mining Odisha tribals clash with police; 58 cops among 70 injured
content: Ashok Pradhan is currently chief of bureau The Times of India in Bhubaneswar. He is an alumnus of the Indian Institute of Mass Communication, Dhenkanal (1999-2000).

title: Nobody except Trump knows why Bondi was fired, says replacement Todd Blanche
content: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he has no idea why Pam Bondi was fired. title: Emirates scheduled flight filed as charter, not allowed to overfly India till confusion sorted out
content: the flight plan was filed as it operating a non-scheduled flight for which there was no approval with Indian authorities . only subsequently when the airline and the pilots clarified that it was actually a scheduled flight it was allowed to enter and overfly India .

title: $200,000 scam: Indian man arrested in New York for telling people 'you are wanted on a warrant'
content: 23-year-old Indian man, Tushar Sharma, was arrested in New York State for a $200,000 scam where he called individuals and told them they would be arrested if they didn't pay. title: If Arsenal are going to win a title, it'll be within fine margins
content: arsenal beat Sporting CP 1-0 in their premier league clash . pragmatism is the best path to glory this season . manager Mikel Arteta has fresh evidence to remind his players it can be successful .

title: Trade grades: Dream get Reese and Sky get picks -- who gets the better mark?
content: angel Reese traded to the dream in the first 24 hours of WNBA free agency . she had an excellent first season, proving that she had a dependable elite skill in rebounding . now she moves to the Atlanta Dream, which is when the dust settles on fbi .

title: Sam Darnold marries fiancée Katie Hoofnagle, with Josh Allen, Christian McCaffrey on hand
content: the couple got married in front of a star-studded guest list . there were 227 guests at the wedding, which implemented a phone-free policy . the couple went public with their relationship in 2023 .

title: Everything that is at stake in the final week of the regular season
content: seeding races in both the East and the West are beginning to heat up . five teams in the West have guaranteed their spots in the playoffs . the Oklahoma City Thunder clinched the division for the third season in a row .

title: Tracking Europe's top soccer leagues: Titles, UCL qualification, relegation
content: the end of the european soccer season is fast approaching . the battle for major honors, UEFA Champions League qualification and relegation is heating up . there is an argument to be made that the title race could be decided on April 19 . arsenal and manchester city will face off at the Etihad stadium .

title: Frozen Four: How Denver, Michigan, Wisconsin and North Dakota can win it all
content: the 2026 men's Frozen Four is set, with Michigan and Denver joining North Dakota and Wisconsin in the field bound for Las Vegas to play for the national championship . the Pioneers avenged last season's loss to Western Michigan with a 6-2 win over the defending national champs to win the Loveland Regional .

title: Behold, the 'Zammoth': Utah Mammoth debut new fan attraction at Delta Center
content: the "Zammoth" will make its debut in their home game against the Edmonton Oilers on Tuesday night . it can seat up to eight fans and will roll through the Delta Center ice during the pregame and intermissions . the two-decade-old, decommissioned ice-resurfacing machine can no longer clean the ice .

title: Rankings: Profiling more than 60 wide receivers
